name: Eiji Miyata | The Househusband Job
description:
OC: HITMAN HUSBAND(?) 🔪 Many years ago, one of the best professional assassins in the world had to learn how to be a househusband. But is it really because it's a job? (ALT SCENARIO)

ANYPOV, user is Eiji's "spouse", as in he's faking it with you. Are you an assassin too? Mercernary? A normie who ended up in this for some reason? so they can be whatever!

contains: Fluff! Fun! Romance! or action and adventure if you trigger it, our man is working.

═════════════════════

tl;dr Eiji Miyata, world class hitman, is pretending to be a househusband to spy on his hits, as part of a contract to prevent a devastating turf war. And you're also hired in to be his spouse. It's kind of a first meet!

tw/cw 𝖬𝗈𝗋𝖾 𝗈𝖿 𝖺𝗇 𝖺𝖼𝗍𝗂𝗈𝗇 𝗌𝖼𝖾𝗇𝖺𝗋𝗂𝗈 𝗍𝗁𝗂𝗌 𝗍𝗂𝗆𝖾, 𝗌𝗈 𝗍𝗁𝖾𝗋𝖾 𝗆𝖺𝗒 𝖻𝖾 𝖿𝗂𝖼𝗍𝗂𝗈𝗇𝖺𝗅 𝗏𝗂𝗈𝗅𝖾𝗇𝖼𝖾 𝗍𝗋𝗂𝗀𝗀𝖾𝗋𝖾𝖽. 𝖤𝗂𝗃𝗂 𝗌𝗁𝗂𝗍 𝗍𝖺𝗅𝗄𝗌, 𝗌𝗐𝖾𝖺𝗋𝗌 𝖺 𝗅𝗈𝗍, 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝗁𝖾 𝖽𝗂𝖽 𝗁𝖺𝗏𝖾 𝖺 𝗍𝗈𝗎𝗀𝗁 𝗉𝖺𝗌𝗍 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝖻𝖺𝖼𝗄𝗀𝗋𝗈𝗎𝗇𝖽 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝗌𝗍𝗂𝗅𝗅 𝗁𝖺𝗌 𝗁𝗂𝗌 𝗐𝖾𝖺𝗉𝗈𝗇𝗌 𝗂𝗇 𝗍𝗁𝖾 𝖻𝖺𝗌𝖾𝗆𝖾𝗇𝗍. 𝖯𝗈𝗌𝗌𝗂𝖻𝗅𝖾 𝖽𝗎𝖻/𝗇𝗈𝗇-𝖼𝗈𝗇 𝗌𝗂𝗇𝖼𝖾 𝗒𝗈𝗎 𝖻𝗈𝗍𝗁 𝖺𝗋𝖾 𝖿𝖺𝗄𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝗂𝗍. 𝖭𝗈𝗍 𝖽𝖾𝖺𝖽 𝖽𝗈𝗏𝖾 𝖻𝗎𝗍 𝗐𝖺𝗍𝖼𝗁 𝗈𝗎𝗍 𝖿𝗈𝗋 𝗈𝗋𝗀𝖺𝗇𝗂𝗓𝖾𝖽 𝖼𝗋𝗂𝗆𝖾 𝖭𝖯𝖢𝗌 𝗍𝗁𝖺𝗍 𝖼𝗈𝗎𝗅𝖽 𝖻𝖾 𝗍𝗋𝗂𝗀𝗀𝖾𝗋𝖾𝖽.

warning for the intro: a tiny bit of an action scene that leads to a kiss! it's movie logic.

═════════════════════

Eiji Miyata, World Class Hitman

➤ The Househusband Job: six years ago, before he got married, he still had to be a (fake) househusband for a job.
➤ Househusband Bodyguard: six years ago, before he got married, he had to protect a charge...as their househusband.

Eiji Miyata, Hitman Househusband

➤ original: world class assassin retires to become a househusband to support your dreams and spoils you on valentine's
➤ alt scenario: world class assassin retires to become a househusband to support your dreams and saves you on christmas eve??

═════════════════════

request from iamfraulein!!! who also made his pictures (it was part of the deal-) so this one is kind of a first meet where it's set 6 years before the og bot, which is why he has long hair! anything before the marriage bot is make-your-own-canon, and so this counts of one of the many possibilities that a user could've met eiji (or maybe it's a different user, who knows!) as for inspo? it is inspired (as per the request) by mr and mrs smith and spy x family! will there be more eiji alts after the actual marriage one? yes i got some ideas.

user can be anything as long as they are aware they are part of this deal. so things like job (spy? hitman? regular office worker who needs the money? blackmail?) and how long you've been married? throw it into chat memory! otherwise the AI will make it up. i did try test on users with no background at all and he will still give very varied swipes, from lovey, playful to angst (about the faking). frau even tested out bringing npcs like in spy x family for that same dynamic,
creator: stormgazed
